pages.proposedH1: Mediterranean Restaurant in Carmichael: Authentic Armenian & Georgian Cuisine
pages.metaDescription: Experience the best Mediterranean restaurant in Carmichael. Yerevan Sac offers authentic Armenian-Georgian cuisine, handmade Khinkali, and wood-fired kebabs in Sacramento.

h2Sections.heading: Authentic Caucasian & Mediterranean Dining in Carmichael
contentBullets: Discover the unique intersection of Armenian and Georgian culinary traditions in the heart of Sacramento County.
Specializing in wood-fired Mangal grills and traditional handmade dough specialties.
A refined sit-down atmosphere perfect for family dinners or a sophisticated night out.

h2Sections.heading: Signature Dishes: From Khinkali to Lula Kebabs
contentBullets: Hand-rolled Georgian soup dumplings (Khinkali) prepared fresh daily.
Traditional Adjaruli Khachapuri featuring molten cheese and a fresh egg yolk.
Premium cuts of lamb, beef, and chicken grilled over open flames for that authentic smoky flavor.

pages.proposedH1: Authentic Armenian Restaurant in Sacramento: Our Culinary Tradition
pages.metaDescription: Learn the story of Yerevan Sac, Sacramento's premier authentic Armenian restaurant. Discover the history of Georgian cuisine and our commitment to Caucasian hospitality.

h2Sections.heading: The Tradition of Caucasian Hospitality in Carmichael
contentBullets: Rooted in the flavors of Yerevan and Tbilisi, our kitchen honors centuries-old recipes.
We prioritize 'Supra' style dining where guests are treated like family.
Our mission is to bring the 'Cradle of Wine' and the 'Mangal' grill to Northern California.

h2Sections.heading: Handmade Craftsmanship & Traditional Methods
contentBullets: Every Khinkali is hand-pleated by dough masters to ensure the perfect soup-to-meat ratio.
We use traditional marination techniques for our Lula and Shish kebabs.
Our Adjaruli Khachapuri is baked in high-heat ovens to achieve the signature crust and molten center.

pages.proposedH1: Authentic Armenian & Georgian Menu in Sacramento
pages.metaDescription: Explore our Armenian-Georgian menu in Carmichael! From handmade Khinkali soup dumplings to Adjaruli Khachapuri and wood-fired Lula kebabs. View prices now.

h2Sections.heading: Handmade Khinkali & Georgian Dough Specialties
contentBullets: Traditional Georgian Khinkali: Spiced beef and pork or vegetarian mushroom fillings.
Adjaruli Khachapuri: The iconic 'cheese boat' with a runny egg and butter finish.
Armenian Manti: Small, open-faced dumplings served with garlic yogurt.
Freshly baked Puri bread from our traditional oven.

h2Sections.heading: Mangal Grill: Lula Kebabs & Prime Meats
contentBullets: Lula Kebabs: Ground beef or lamb seasoned with Caucasian spices and grilled over open flame.
Shish Kebabs: Tender chunks of marinated pork, chicken, or lamb.
Grilled Vegetables: Fire-roasted tomatoes, peppers, and eggplants.
Traditional sides including saffron rice and sumac-dusted onions.
